title: Unguiculabia alpina
taxonomy: Unguiculabia alpina is a plant species classified within the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Unguiculabia. This classification places it in the clade of legumes, which are known for their fruit pods and nitrogen-fixing abilities. Further classification positions it as a member of the subfamily Faboideae. However, specific classification details may be subject to ongoing research and revision.
